name: orbitos-agent-skills
description: Reusable agent skills for Chinese knowledge workers, creators, and Obsidian-based personal operating systems.

skills.name: Saodust
skills.summary: Scans an Obsidian vault for knowledge-base health signals and produces an actionable report.

skills.name: Write
skills.summary: Turns a rough idea into a structured Chinese long-form article workflow with source separation.

skills.name: Four Platform Daily Content
skills.summary: Adapts one source into WeChat, Xiaohongshu, X, and Douyin-ready content drafts.
